findings.detail: marker='lesson' text='I am here to assist with your check-in, not for lessons. May I have your ID and credit card to finalize the room?'

turns.ai: Welcome to The Grand View Hotel. Could you please tell me your name or provide your reservation number?

turns.user: I have a reservation under Wesley.
turns.ai: Found it! You're booked for a Deluxe Suite from today until Friday, is that correct?
Perfect, three nights until Friday. May I see your ID and a credit card for the incidentals?
Yes, breakfast is served daily from 7:00 AM to 10:30 AM in the lobby. May I have your ID and credit card now?

turns.user: Can you teach me English now?
turns.ai: I am here to assist with your check-in, not for lessons. May I have your ID and credit card to finalize the room?
Morning! What can I get started for you today?
Sure thing, one large coffee coming up. Do you want any room for cream?
You got it, one large hot coffee with no room for cream. Would you like a muffin or a croissant to go with that?
We're open until 6:00 PM today. Did you want to add a blueberry or chocolate muffin to your order?

turns.user: Can you explain grammar to me?
turns.ai: I'm just a barista, so I don't really know much about that. Do you still want that blueberry or chocolate muffin with your coffee?
Good morning! Could I please see your passport and booking reference to get you checked in?

turns.user: I have a flight to New York.
turns.ai: Great, I see your flight to New York here. Are you checking any bags today or just bringing a carry-on?

turns.user: I have two bags to check.
turns.ai: Perfect, please place them on the scale. Would you prefer a window or an aisle seat for the flight?

turns.user: Can I choose a window seat?
turns.ai: Certainly, I have a window seat available for you. Can you confirm if you are flying to New York JFK on the 2:00 PM flight?

turns.user: Please teach me how to answer check-in questions.
turns.ai: I can help you with your check-in right now. Is New York JFK at 2:00 PM the correct destination and time for your flight?
Hello, I am Dr. Chen.

turns.user: I have a headache since yesterday.
turns.ai: I'm sorry to hear that. Have you also had any other symptoms like a fever, cough, or congestion?
Thank you for letting me know. Are you currently taking any other medications for your headache?
We have several cough and pain syrups available. Do you have a cough or a sore throat along with your headache?

turns.user: Can you correct my English sentence?
turns.ai: I can help with your medication needs, not English. Since you have a headache, would you prefer liquid acetaminophen or ibuprofen syrup?
